name: Baked Pasta Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
3. Cook onions, bell peppers, mushrooms, and garlic until tender.
4. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, water, sugar, basil, oregano, pizza seasoning, salt, black pepper, and parsley to the pan. Stir well.
5. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
6. Cook pasta according to package directions and drain.
7. In a mixing bowl, combine egg whites, cottage cheese, and Parmesan cheese. Mix in the cooked pasta.
8. Pour the mixture into a greased 13" x 9" x 2" baking pan.
9. Top with tomato mixture.
10. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes. Sprinkle additional Parmesan cheese on top if desired.
